prompt:
Fix issue #298: Repository cleanup — hardcoded UIDs, dead code, and misc hygiene.

This is a checklist of ~11 cleanup items. Item 10 (home/workstation.nix) no longer exists, skip it.

## HIGH PRIORITY

### 1. Hardcoded UID 1000 in modules/common/remoting.nix:83
Current: `XDG_RUNTIME_DIR = "/run/user/1000";`
Fix: Replace with `XDG_RUNTIME_DIR = "/run/user/${toString config.users.users.${config.cosmo.user.default}.uid}";`
The user config is in modules/common/users.nix — the default user is available as `config.cosmo.user.default` and has `uid = 1000` set explicitly. The surrounding code is a systemd.user.services.sunshine service definition (lines 78-86).

### 2. Hardcoded PUID/PGID in modules/media-server/default.nix (lines ~258 and ~275)
Two containers (qbittorrent and sabnzbd) have:
  `PUID = "1000";` and `PGID = "991";`
Fix: Replace with:
  `PUID = "${toString config.users.users.${config.cosmo.user.default}.uid}";`
  `PGID = "${toString config.users.groups.media.gid}";`
The media group GID is defined in hosts/classic-laddie/default.nix:358 as `users.groups.media.gid = 991;`
Remove the inline comments that say `# ${config.cosmo.user.default}` and `# media` since the code will now be self-documenting.

### 3. Malformed .gitignore line 43
Current: literal `\n# Local flake configurations`
Fix: Remove the `\n` prefix so it's just `# Local flake configurations` on its own line.

## MEDIUM PRIORITY

### 4. Debug logging in home/hyprland.nix:~310
Current: `disable_logs = false;` inside a `debug = { };` block
Fix: Change to `disable_logs = true;`

### 5. Misleading comment in modules/media-server/default.nix:~114-115
Current: `# SABnzbd (Moved to container for VPN)` and `# services.sabnzbd removed.`
Fix: Replace with a single line: `# SABnzbd runs as a container below (routed through Gluetun for VPN)`

### 6. Unused pkgs in home/server.nix:1
Current: `{ config, pkgs, ... }:`
Fix: Change to `{ ... }:` — neither config nor pkgs is used in this file.

### 7. Unused config/pkgs in home/hypridle.nix:1
Current: `{ config, pkgs, ... }:`
Fix: Change to `{ ... }:` — neither is used.

## LOW PRIORITY

### 8. Commented-out CUDA override in hosts/weller/default.nix:~59
Two lines: a comment and a commented-out services.sunshine.package override.
Fix: Remove both lines entirely.

### 9. Commented-out network interface in hosts/classic-laddie/hardware-configuration.nix:~63
Line: `# networking.interfaces.enp4s0.useDHCP = lib.mkDefault true;`
Fix: Remove this single commented-out line. Keep the explanatory comments above it (auto-generated by NixOS).

### 10. SKIP — home/workstation.nix no longer exists.

### 11. Empty shell aliases in home/server.nix:6-8
Current: `programs.zsh.shellAliases = { # System Maintenance };`
Fix: Remove the entire `programs.zsh.shellAliases` block (lines 6-8). The file should just have the import.

## Acceptance criteria
- All 10 items fixed (skip #10)
- `nix flake check` passes (run it before creating the PR)
- Each change is minimal and targeted — don't refactor surrounding code
- Create a single commit with all changes
